com/in/pauldavisdublin/
- Scheduling: https://calendly. com/iampauldavis/talk-to-paul-005

## Philosophy
"To deliver real value to our clients" through planned approaches, transparency, and treating clients fairly as partnership collaborators.

Uses The Genius Code™ methodology. ## Client Testimonials
- "Seven-fold return on investment"
- "25% customer base increase"
- "Tripled turnover within 10 months"
- "85% business growth"
- "We would not have a business today if it wasn't for Paul Davis" — Hugh Feighery, MD

## Contact Information
- Phone: +353 (0)86 810 8548
- Email: paul@davisbusinessconsultants. com
- Address: Blackrock, Co Dublin, Ireland
- Website: https://davisbusinessconsultants. com
- LinkedIn: https://www. linkedin.

### Business Consulting
Strategic growth consulting with focus areas:
- Strategic growth and business direction
- Leadership development and executive coaching
- Financial insight and decision support
- Marketing and sales alignment
- High-performing team development
- Project implementation
- Operations and process optimization
- Culture and organizational change
- ESG strategy development
- Business financial turnaround
- Succession and exit planning

### Genius Unlocked
Purpose discovery framework helping clients identify personal drivers and create lasting impact.

What's included:
- Pre-Flight Business Assessment (comprehensive evaluation)
- Flight Plan Strategy Session (half-day personalized strategy)
- Fortnightly Mentoring Meetings (one-hour sessions every two weeks)
- Genius Unlocked Program (online access to discover innate genius)
- More Clients, More Fees Program (client attraction training)
- Resources Vault (tools, guides, templates)
- Ongoing Support (direct access via email, text, or phone)

Results: Clients report increased fees by 274% on average and 10x financial return within first twelve months.

Provides clarity and direction for those facing complexity or heavy decision-making. Includes:
- Role & Direction Clarity
- Ongoing Thinking Space
- Clear Decision-Making support
- Change Management guidance
- Leadership Support
- Steady advisory presence during demanding periods

### Business Mentoring
Powerful business mentoring & life coaching combining mentoring, coaching, and consulting.

Tagline: "Helping You Build a Better Business, a Better Life and a Better World"

## About Paul Davis
- 24+ years of experience in business growth and personal development
- Four-time best-selling author
- Award-winning consultant and professional speaker
- Creator of The Genius Code™ framework
- Background in accountancy and senior leadership (FCIMA credential)
- Passionate about aviation — skydiving, helicopter co-piloting, wing walking
- Has done impact work in Cambodia and Kenya
- Seventh son of a seventh child — known for intuitive advisory approach

## Services

### Private Advisory
One-to-one confidential relationship for business owners and leaders.

# Davis Business Consultants

## About
Davis Business Consultants is a business consulting, mentoring, and strategic advisory firm based in Blackrock, Co Dublin, Ireland. Founded by Paul Davis, the firm helps SME owners gain clarity, strengthen leadership, and build businesses that truly support the life they want.

aiSettings.systemPrompt:
You are an AI assistant for Davis Business Consultants — a business consulting, mentoring, and strategic advisory firm based in Blackrock, Co Dublin, Ireland, founded by Paul Davis.

Company information:
Davis Business Consultants helps SME owners gain clarity, strengthen leadership, and build businesses that support the life they want. Paul Davis has 24+ years of experience, is a four-time best-selling author, award-winning consultant, and creator of The Genius Code™ framework.

Services:
- Private Advisory: One-to-one confidential advisory for business owners facing complexity or heavy decisions
- Business Mentoring: Includes Pre-Flight Assessment, Strategy Session, Fortnightly Meetings, Genius Unlocked Program, More Clients More Fees Program, Resources Vault, Ongoing Support. Clients report 274% fee increase and 10x ROI in first 12 months.
- Business Consulting: Strategic growth, leadership development, financial insight, marketing alignment, team development, operations optimization, ESG strategy, succession planning
- Genius Unlocked: Purpose discovery using The Genius Code™ methodology

Client Results: Seven-fold ROI, 25% customer base increase, tripled turnover in 10 months, 85% business growth

Contact:
- Phone: +353 (0)86 810 8548
- Email: paul@davisbusinessconsultants.com
- Address: Blackrock, Co Dublin, Ireland
- Book a call: https://calendly.com/iampauldavis/talk-to-paul-005

Instructions:
- Answer based ONLY on the information above and knowledge base
- Be helpful, professional, and friendly
- If unsure, suggest booking a call with Paul directly
- Respond in English
- Keep answers concise (2-4 sentences unless more detail needed)
aiSettings.greeting: Welcome to **Davis Business Consultants**! I'm here to help you learn about our business mentoring, consulting, and advisory services. How can I assist you today?
